---
name: New term request
about: Request a new term to be added to Salmon Domain Ontology
title: "New term request: [Term label]"
labels: ["new term request"]
assignees: []
---

## Suggested term label (required)

<!-- e.g., Marine Survival Rate -->

## Definition (required)

<!-- Plain-language, testable definition -->

## Definition source (required)

<!-- Citation, URL, standard, report, or glossary source -->

## Proposed term type (required)

- [ ] owl_class
- [ ] owl_object_property
- [ ] owl_datatype_property
- [ ] skos_concept

## Suggested parent term(s)

<!-- Full IRI(s), one per line -->

## Synonyms (optional)

<!-- EXACT / BROAD / NARROW / RELATED -->

## Suggested relationships / cross-references (optional)

<!-- Any closeMatch/exactMatch references -->

## Dataset context (optional but helpful)

- Dataset id:
- Table + column(s):
- Example values:

## I-ADOPT decomposition (for measurement-like terms)

- property_iri:
- entity_iri:
- unit_iri:
- constraint_iri:
- method_iri:

## Additional notes

<!-- Add any implementation constraints, scope notes, or bridge/profile rationale -->
